title: Weekly Links #1

content:
Rust has been voted the most loved language for years. Here’s why.
Why Rust?Memory safety without a garbage collector. Zero-cost abstractions. Amazing tooling with Cargo.
First ImpressionsThe borrow checker feels strict at first, but it catches bugs at compile time that would be runtime crashes in other languages.
RUSTCollapseCopyfn main() { println!("Hello, Rust!"); }fn main() { println!("Hello, Rust!"); }Resources The Rust BookRust by ExampleRustlings
summary: Rust has been voted the most loved language for years. Here’s why.
title: Learning Rust in 2025

content:
A collection of tools that make my development workflow smoother.
EditorVS Code with Vim keybindings. Lightweight, extensible, and great IntelliSense.
Terminal Kitty - GPU-accelerated terminal emulator tmux - terminal multiplexer zsh + starship - fast shell with a beautiful prompt Git lazygit - terminal UI for git gh - GitHub CLI for PRs and issues ContainerDocker + docker-compose for local development environments.
summary: A collection of tools that make my development workflow smoother.
title: My Favorite Developer Tools

content:
Hugo is one of the fastest static site generators out there.
Why Hugo?Hugo is written in Go and can build thousands of pages in seconds. No dependencies, no runtime required.
Quick StartBASHCollapseCopyhugo new site my-site cd my-site git init git submodule add https://github.com/g1eny0ung/hugo-theme-dream.git themes/dreamhugo new site my-site cd my-site git init git submodule add https://github.com/g1eny0ung/hugo-theme-dream.git themes/dreamProject StructurePLAINTEXTCollapseCopycontent/ ├── posts/ │ └── my-post.md └── about/ └── index.md config/ └── _default/ ├── hugo.yaml └── params.yamlcontent/ ├── posts/ │ └── my-post.md └── about/ └── index.md config/ └── _default/ ├── hugo.yaml └── params.yaml
summary: Hugo is one of the fastest static site generators out there.
title: Getting Started with Hugo

content:
Welcome to Charlie Byte Biu~!
This is my personal blog built with Hugo and the Dream theme.
Getting StartedHugo is a fast and modern static site generator written in Go. It takes Markdown files and renders them into a complete static HTML site.
InstallationYou can install Hugo via package managers:
BASHCollapseCopybrew install hugo # macOS sudo apt install hugo # Ubuntubrew install hugo # macOS sudo apt install hugo # UbuntuConfigurationThe hugo.yaml file contains all site settings like base URL, title, theme, and language. Theme-specific settings go in params.yaml.
Writing PostsPosts are written in Markdown with frontmatter (YAML between --- lines) for metadata like title, date, categories, and tags.
MARKDOWNCollapseCopy--- title: My Post date: 2025-01-01 categories: - Tech tags: - hugo --- Content goes here...--- title: My Post date: 2025-01-01 categories: - Tech tags: - hugo --- Content goes here...Features Masonry layout for the post grid Light/Dark mode toggle Client-side search powered by Fuse.js Table of contents sidebar on single posts RSS feed for subscribers Next StepsExplore the theme and customize it to your liking. Add more posts, enable comments, or tweak the color scheme.
summary:
Welcome to Charlie Byte Biu~!
This is my personal blog built with Hugo and the Dream theme.
title: Hello World
